highlights.title: SoftBank Shares Hit Record With Lift From OpenAI IPO Hopes
highlights.description: SoftBank Group Corp. shares climbed to a record high, spurred by hopes of big returns from the Japanese investor’s stakes in OpenAI and SB Energy Corp., should the two go public.

highlights.title: Huawei Touts Chip Breakthrough to Shorten Gap With TSMC
highlights.description: Huawei Technologies Co. said it has come up with a new pathway to shorten its gap with industry leader Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., potentially achieving a breakthrough in making advanced semiconductors without cutting-edge equipment.

highlights.title: Anthropic to release Mythos-class models to the public
highlights.description: AI flaw-finder still under lock and key for now while company figures out guardrails, but extends access to more users including governments

highlights.title: Zepto Said to Plan June Public Filing for $1 Billion India IPO
highlights.description: Rapid-commerce firm Zepto Ltd. is preparing to publicly file in the first half of June for an initial public offering that may raise up to $1 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

highlights.title: SoftBank Taps Retail Market Again With $1.6 Billion Yen Bond
highlights.description: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to raise ¥260 billion ($1.6 billion) through another sale of subordinated bonds aimed mainly at individual investors, about two months after a similar retail offering.

highlights.title: Pope Leo Warns AI Should Be Prevented From ‘Dominating Humanity’
highlights.description: Pope Leo XIV said artificial intelligence should be “disarmed” to protect humanity from its dangers, adding his voice to a heated debate over the extent to which governments should regulate a technology that is reshaping the world.

highlights.title: Samsung memory workers call off strike and may score six-figure bonuses
highlights.description: PLUS: Huawei says it’s replaced Moore’s Law; Chinese mobile plans add token allowances; Singtel slinging Optus; And more!

highlights.title: AI wealth must benefit the public, South Korea's deputy PM says amid Samsung labor tensions
highlights.description: South Korea's deputy PM tells CNBC there are concerns as to whether AI could worsen wealth gaps or lead to job losses.

highlights.title: Apple Watchに変革を、Whoopやオーラ台頭でヘルスケアアプリに課題－Power On
highlights.description: 健康ウエアラブル端末市場で競争激化、AI時代への対応課題に

highlights.title: The AI Era Is Creating a Bug Hunting Arms Race
highlights.description: As attackers ramp up their AI exploit development, the search for software vulnerabilities is changing rapidly.

ai.title: Sakura Internet Eyes More Spending to Meet Japan’s AI Demand
ai.description: Sakura Internet Inc.’s chief said the company may need to hike its capital spending by nearly seven times its initial plan to keep up with artificial intelligence demand in Japan.

ai.title: Digital sovereignty, the musical: One engineer’s bizarre crusade against hyperscalers
ai.description: A French engineer has declared war on AWS, Google and Microsoft using AI-generated sea shanties, satirical poetry, and a multilingual protest campaign

business.title: Hyperliquid is emerging as a challenger to traditional exchanges and prediction markets, says FalconX
business.description: A new report shows Hyperliquid is rapidly expanding beyond crypto into pre-IPO markets, prediction contracts, and 24/7 asset trading, putting Wall Street giants on high alert.

crypto.title: Bitcoin options are coming to Nasdaq. Here's what it means for you.
crypto.description: The new offering, pending CFTC approval, aims to democratize seamless crypto risk management
